sections: HCM-1.4 — Profile-aware setup and doctor decisions
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-1.4 profile-aware setup and doctor decision proof gate
reviewed dependency, implementation, and proof evidence

repo_truth: Fresh read-only Review 6 of the exact seventeen-file five-times-remediated HCM-1.4 planning subject. Reviews 1-5 returned six, four, two, one, and one Required findings; the parent remediated each complete round in docs only. Review 5 accepted every earlier remedy and found only that one combined privacy doctest could not independently prove both boundaries or serve as pre-API RED. The current packet requires separate compile_fail,E0451 external-struct-literal and compile_fail,E0624 external-from_code doctests as post-API boundary proof, retains exhaustive thirteen-row replay, and limits pre-API RED to positive compile-contract tests. All five predecessor dispatches and six proof/remediation walls are manifested. Independently derive a complete verdict; inherit no approval.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted seventeen-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint before review.
Review every byte of 00, 04, 06, current SPEC/plan/unchecked todo, all six proof/remediation walls, and all five predecessor immutable dispatches.

Read unchanged control-pack authority, landed HCM-1.1/HCM-1.2/HCM-1.3 source/tests/records, live setup/doctor/route-state/author/CLI/profile/condition/registry code, Cargo manifests, package proof, CI, and official dependency docs only as needed.

Run read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, API compile-feasibility, setup error-table, doctest-discrimination, inspection status/reason, exact allowlist, TDD-ordering, author-regression, package/source-tree, cross-platform, compatibility, determinism, and security checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.

No Rust, Cargo, runtime/product, production authoring, reset repair, condition evidence/evaluator, compiler publication, CI, canonical content, HCM-2+, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, adapter, contract, or dock implementation.

Do not infer an unspecified evidence producer, API field/type, error precedence, inspection pair, compatibility bridge, reset transaction, publication change, platform proof, final HCM-4 DTO, content authority, or later-slice behavior.
Do not treat either parent remediation or predecessor review as approval.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact seventeen-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with severity, exact file/line, violated gate, concrete failure, smallest remediation, and invalidated proof.

Re-verify every Review 1-4 remedy from live authority/source: current status/selector; condition unknown narrowing; reset honesty; exact APIs; compiler source-tree and actual-Windows gates; author test helpers; total setup/root/inspection/error behavior; fail-closed invalid roots; private closed SetupErrorCode and derived accessors.

Re-verify Review 5 closure: one independent compile_fail,E0451 sample contains only the external struct literal; one independent compile_fail,E0624 sample contains only the external from_code call; both are post-API GREEN/boundary proof; exhaustive thirteen-row replay remains mandatory; pre-API RED uses only positive compile-contract tests absent before the API.

Review all engine/compiler code blocks, algorithms, allowlists, TDD ordering, serialization, errors, status precedence, mutation boundaries, custom injection, default shipped resolution, inspection projection, author fixtures, and CLI mapping for any remaining implementation-time choice or live-source incompatibility.

Verify complete focused/sibling/workspace/engine-package/compiler-source-tree/actual-Windows/security/determinism/scope/handoff/GitNexus proof is feasible and no mandatory proof needs a forbidden file/dependency.

Verify control-pack cross-document consistency and classification ceiling, todo unchecked, docs-only current mutations, immutable remediation lineage with the Remediation 4 singular-doctest claim explicitly superseded, final review/two-commit closeout, and no condition-evaluator/content/reset-publication/HCM-2 activation.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, live source, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.

Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than inventing evidence authority, API fields, request/error precedence, inspection pairs, authoring behavior, compatibility, reset transaction, publication, platform proof, content authority, or later-slice decisions.
Return to the parent if remediation would require Rust/runtime work, broader control-pack authority, HCM-2+, or global handoff/ledger mutation.
